title: 菊花賞の後に・燃える心

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother... I... I...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister... I... I...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah... So close!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I kept thinking, "just a little more and I'll catch up
to her!" but I just couldn't do it!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I wanted to catch her so badly this time!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Rice.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Gyah! Bourbon?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I was surprised by your performance today.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I could not help but wonder how you are able to
run like that...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Finally, I arrived at a single conclusion... One you
speak of often.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: It was all to "catch up" to me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Speaking honestly, I still do not understand it. In
a race, there is only victory or defeat.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: There is no "catching up." Yet...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Can you hear that?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: What a race! Good job, Bourbon! Good job, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
As expected of this year's stars! I'm so excited to
see them again next year!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Th-they're not just cheering for you... They're
cheering for me too?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-but... compared to you... I'm just...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No, I concur with the crowd. You and I are equals
in ability.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: So I will say this...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I will not lose to you next time either... My rival.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ri...val...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Rice. Will you race against me again?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I won't lose either! Next time... I'll win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower's voice echoes loudly. Her daring
declaration reaches the ears of not only those
nearby, but everyone at the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think about what race she should run in next to
help her talent as a stayer bloom even further.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First, we'll prepare for the Nikkei Sho as a
jumping-off point.
